title: CareTask
description: One scheduled care action as the Verdant mock API returns it (fictional demo data). The shape care-task-row binds; plantId references a Plant (plant-card.contract.json) by id. Derived fields are baked against the scenario's fixed fictional today (the brief's head) — committed demo data stays coherent forever.

plantId.description: id of the plant this task belongs to

plantName.description: denormalised for display — the row renders without fetching the plant

done.description: already logged in the scenario's history; done tasks carry status "ok" and stay out of the Today list

status.description: derived from due vs the scenario's fixed fictional today
